shape_decode: cmp=L, vp=W, vpc=_, naive=L : value_profile resolves; cmplog AND naive block; value_profile_cmplog non-decisive => a BARE VP CMP_MAP operand-distance gradient that I2S substitution (cmplog) AND blind havoc (naive) both fail to climb.
label_source: Layer-1 resolve pattern (cmp,vp,vpc,naive)=(L,W,_,L). The only technique present in the winner (value_profile) and absent in the decisive losers (naive; cmplog carries I2S but no CMP_MAP gradient) is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback. THIS test is the independent real-data verification (G2) of HOW that gradient manifests in the corpus.
round_history: round0: whole shape on value_distance_reached (literal + numeric); 4/7 validated, 3 inconclusive. round2: joint_necessity token+size (H1) + operand_enrichment (H2); 4 sqlite3 operator branches + lcms_2141 labeled. round3: added depth_reach (parser-depth into structured true-side) + value_distance_reached NUMERIC mode for the 3 still-unlabeled branches (lcms_2446, libxml2_6756, sqlite3_14777). round4 (FINAL, loop-until-dry): the 3 round-3 mechanisms were SCORED on real campaign data and DID NOT HOLD -- lcms_2446 [rule_not_met 3/6], libxml2_6756 [rule_not_met 6/6], sqlite3_14777 [rule_not_met 3/6]. round4 makes the FINAL determination per branch: libxml2_6756 gets ONE genuinely-different UNTRIED tool (token_count: exact-opener-literal presence) because its gate IS a 9-byte exact literal that neither token-class counting (tag_lift) nor execution-depth (depth_reach) measured; lcms_2446 (numeric inequality, no literal) and sqlite3_14777 (literal-less token-class) are judged HONESTLY decidable:false -- their bare-VP mechanism has no REMAINING built measurement that discriminates it from the obvious alternative, and re-running the already-failed tools at a relaxed threshold is forbidden.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient drives corpus admission toward structurally larger / more-token-rich seeds: the VP-RESOLVING corpus physically CONTAINS more of the gate's required structural tokens (SQL keyword/operator tokens) than the naive-BLOCKING corpus, because the gradient rewards partial assembly that edge-only feedback discards. STRUCTURAL-ASSEMBLY / token-availability advantage, NOT scalar value-distance.

measurement.tool_mode: analyze_pair(winner_fz=value_profile, loser_fz=naive). The discriminating contrast is W=value_profile-resolving vs L=naive-blocking, emitted as winner_tags/loser_tags/tag_lift + winner_size/loser_size/size_lift.

tokens_by_target.sqlite3_14438: SQL structural tokens incl. the '>>' shift operator: --tokens 'SELECT,FROM,WHERE,>>,>=,<=,=,<<,-,/,*'.
tokens_by_target.sqlite3_15515: SQL tokens incl. the two-char operator second-char '=': --tokens 'SELECT,FROM,WHERE,>=,<=,=,-,/,*'.

hypotheses.prediction: tag_lift = winner_tags - loser_tags >= 1.0. DISCRIMINATING vs scalar-distance: tag_lift counts whole-token PRESENCE, orthogonal to residual Hamming distance. DISCRIMINATING vs naive-found-it-anyway: blind havoc would carry the tokens too (tag_lift ~ 0). DISCRIMINATING vs pure-I2S: cmplog carries the identical I2S mutator yet still BLOCKS (Layer-1). EMPIRICAL ANCHOR (s4): 14438 tag_lift 3.5, 15242 3.8, 15515 2.73.
hypotheses.rule_note: Unchanged from round-3 (KEEP). Confirmed on the 3 sqlite3 operator branches (tag_lift 2.7-3.8).

hypotheses.label: for the fixed-offset FOURCC gate (lcms_2141 DeviceClass 'scnr' at offset 0x0c-0x0f, decoy 'mntr'), value_profile's gradient enriches the resolving corpus for the TARGET operand bytes relative to the DECOY bytes at the gate offset, because near-miss FOURCC bytes register as new CMP_MAP buckets and steer the corpus toward 'scnr'.

measurement.tool_mode: analyze_branch(winner_fuzzer=value_profile, loser_fuzzer=naive). lcms_2141 is the ONE fixed-offset literal-vs-decoy gate: W seeds carry 'scnr' (73 63 6e 72) at 0x0c-0x0f, L seeds carry 'mntr' (6d 6e 74 72) at the SAME offset; enrichment = log2 of target-byte freq in the value_profile corpus vs the naive corpus. (sB-local corpus; sB runs operand_enrichment on its own on-disk lcms queue -- NOT decidable:false.)

params.scope: lcms_2141 ONLY. operand_enrichment correctly returns no_gate_signature for the dispersed/token-class/threshold branches. data_realities #3 honored.
params.caveat: 4-byte FOURCC operand (width=4) above the width<=2 chance-alignment band; target vs decoy are DISTINCT 4-byte values, so the contrast is clean. agg=max recovers the most-differentiating offset.

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0 AND signed_target_enrich > decoy_enrich. DISCRIMINATING vs naive luck: a no-gradient corpus shows signed_target_enrich ~ 0. DISCRIMINATING vs pure-I2S: cmplog (I2S, no gradient) still BLOCKS (Layer-1).
hypotheses.rule_note: Unchanged from round-3 (KEEP). Standard operand_enrichment pro-signature.

hypotheses.label: for token-CLASS / structural-ENTRY gates with NO single counted literal, value_profile's gradient admits a corpus that PARSES DEEPER: its resolving seeds drive the gate line's TRUE side substantially more per-seed than the naive-blocking seeds, whereas naive's edge-only seeds are byte-soup that never enters the structured branch. EXECUTION-DEPTH / true-side reach advantage.

measurement.tool_mode: Run value_profile-RESOLVING (W) vs naive-BLOCKING (L) seeds through libafl-<target>-cov; read the gate line's per-seed-normalized true-side count. side_lift = winner true-side vs loser true-side.

hypotheses.prediction: winner_deeper = true AND side_lift >= 2.0. DISCRIMINATING vs token-presence: depth_reach measures ACTUAL execution into the structured branch. DISCRIMINATING vs naive-reaches-it: cards report naive true-side T=0.
hypotheses.rule_note: Unchanged from round-3 (KEEP; confirmed on >=1 of its members per the round-3 scoring). The members list is held verbatim for monotonicity; round-4 does NOT re-test the rule-not-met member here -- see the round-4 hypotheses below for the per-branch FINAL determination.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's gradient drives a parsed numeric field MONOTONICALLY toward / across an inequality threshold via CMP_MAP operand-distance buckets on the integer comparison, while naive (edge-only) and cmplog (no single constant to splice for an inequality) stall below the bound. MAGNITUDE-GAP gradient, measured by value_distance_reached's NUMERIC mode.

measurement.tool_mode: NUMERIC mode. Parse the derived TagCount field (big-endian u32, _cmsReadUInt32Number at cmsio0.c:826) and compute the magnitude gap to MAX_TABLE_TAG (line 827). W=value_profile-resolving vs L=naive-blocking.

params.operand_literal: MAX_TABLE_TAG threshold; field = TagCount, 4-byte big-endian u32 at cmsio0.c:826; gate = TagCount > MAX_TABLE_TAG at line 827.

hypotheses.prediction: winner_closer == true AND distance_gap > 0. DISCRIMINATING vs literal substitution: an inequality gate has NO single target constant for I2S to splice. DISCRIMINATING vs naive luck: card reports naive T=0 F=10 (never crossed).
hypotheses.rule_note: Unchanged from round-3 (KEEP; confirmed on >=1 branch per round-3 scoring -- the brief lists '2x vp_climbs_numeric_magnitude_to_threshold' confirmed). Held verbatim for monotonicity. round-4 does NOT re-test lcms_2446 with this rule (it scored rule_not_met for lcms_2446); lcms_2446's FINAL determination is decidable:false below.

hypotheses.label: NEW (round4): for libxml2_6756 (the '<![CDATA[' 9-byte exact-literal opener gate, presence_or_nonnull) value_profile's CMP_MAP distance gradient over the multi-byte opener comparison preserves partial-match seeds and ratchets the corpus to physically CONTAIN the full exact opener literal, whereas the naive-blocking corpus carries only unrelated XML fragments ('xlink:type', '!DOCTYPE', 'http:/xml') and is DEPLETED of the opener. EXACT-LITERAL PRESENCE in the corpus -- a genuinely different signal than token-CLASS counting (tag_lift, which failed: the opener is not one of the XML structural tokens tag_lift counts) and than execution-DEPTH (depth_reach, which also failed): a seed can carry the opener as bytes without the per-seed cov image scoring a deeper true-side reach. This is the precise round-2/round-3 failure mode this round resolves.

measurement.tool_mode: branch(--target libxml2 --branch-id 6756 --literal '<![CDATA[' --winner-fuzzer value_profile --loser-fuzzer naive). Counts the EXACT 9-byte opener literal '<![CDATA[' (3c 21 5b 43 44 41 54 41 5b) per-seed in the value_profile-RESOLVING (winner) vs naive-BLOCKING (loser) DB seed sets, reading bytes from the on-disk queue. literal_presence_ratio = (loser_count + 0.5)/(winner_count + 0.5): < 1 => the opener is depleted in the naive-blocking arm. libxml2 is sB's target; sB runs token_count on its OWN on-disk libxml2 queue + db seeds -- NOT decidable:false for being off THIS server.

params.caveat: 9-byte literal -- far above the chance-alignment band; an unrelated corpus has effectively zero probability of carrying the exact 9-byte opener, so winner_literal_count >= 1 with the naive arm depleted is a clean, high-specificity signal. token_count is a NEW descriptor for this shape, UNTRIED on libxml2_6756 (round-2 tried tag_lift token-CLASS count, round-3 tried depth_reach execution-depth -- BOTH distinct from exact-literal presence).

hypotheses.prediction: winner_literal_count >= 1 AND literal_presence_ratio <= 0.34: the value_profile-resolving corpus physically carries the exact '<![CDATA[' opener (>= ~1 occurrence per seed on average) while the naive-blocking corpus is depleted of it (ratio well below 1). DISCRIMINATING vs naive-found-it-anyway: a no-gradient corpus would carry the opener at comparable rates (ratio ~ 1), so ratio << 1 is exactly the gradient signature. DISCRIMINATING vs token-CLASS presence (tag_lift): tag_lift counts XML structural tokens, NONE of which is the literal opener -- a corpus can be rich in generic XML tokens yet never assemble the exact 9-byte opener, which is why tag_lift scored rule_not_met. DISCRIMINATING vs execution-depth (depth_reach): the opener presence is a BYTE-COMPOSITION fact independent of whether the per-seed cov image scored a deeper true-side reach (depth_reach scored rule_not_met). DISCRIMINATING vs pure-I2S: cmplog carries the identical I2S mutator yet BLOCKS (Layer-1), so single-event substitution does not persistently seat the multi-byte opener in the corpus; only the gradient does. A null (winner_literal_count ~ 0 OR ratio ~ 1) refutes the literal-assembly story.
hypotheses.rule_note: token_count's pro-VP literal-assembly signature: the exact opener present in the value_profile-resolving arm and depleted in the naive-blocking arm. ratio<=0.34 matches token_count's own documented erasure/depletion band (< 0.34). Both clauses over token_count's named metrics only. GENUINELY DIFFERENT mechanism + tool than the two refuted for this branch (tag_lift, depth_reach).

hypotheses.label: FINAL (round4) decidable:false: sqlite3_14777 (sqlite3GetToken token-CLASS true branch; operand_literal=null, operand_width=null). The bare-VP mechanism is 'the gradient steers the corpus toward well-formed structured SQL whose characters classify into the token CLASS that fires the GetToken true branch' -- but the gate has NO single counted literal (it is a character-class dispatch, not a byte-equality), so token_count cannot apply (no literal to count); operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature (no fixed-offset target-vs-decoy value); value_distance_reached has no operand_literal to anchor a distance; depth_reach was tried (round-3) and SCORED rule_not_met. The one remaining UNTRIED built tool, corpus_size_ratio, measures whole-corpus INFLATION/HOMOGENIZATION -- an I2S-arm signature -- which is the WRONG mechanism for a bare-VP LW_L gate and would NOT discriminate the VP gradient from the obvious 'no corpus effect' alternative (it would violate G1). With no remaining built measurement that discriminates this token-class mechanism, the honest outcome is decidable:false.

measurement.tool_mode: NONE applicable. token_count: no single literal (token-CLASS char dispatch, operand_literal=null). operand_enrichment: no fixed-offset target-vs-decoy. value_distance_reached: no operand_literal / no numeric threshold to anchor. depth_reach: tried round-3, rule_not_met. corpus_size_ratio: whole-corpus inflation/homogenization is an I2S-arm signal, not a bare-VP-gradient discriminator (G1 violation).

hypotheses.prediction: NONE. No built measurement isolates the token-class-structured-SQL gradient for a literal-less gate after depth_reach already failed; an honest inconclusive is the correct G3 outcome.
hypotheses.rule_note: G3 honest non-discriminable. Not a forced label and not a relaxed-threshold re-test of the already-failed depth_reach. Falls to fallback=inconclusive.

hypotheses.label: FINAL (round4) decidable:false: lcms_2446 (TagCount > MAX_TABLE_TAG inequality_or_range, derived_integer u32, operand_literal=MAX_TABLE_TAG, no spliceable target constant). The bare-VP mechanism is 'the gradient climbs the parsed TagCount magnitude across the threshold'. The ONLY built tool that can measure a numeric-magnitude crossing is value_distance_reached's NUMERIC mode -- and it was applied (round-3, both numeric hypotheses) and SCORED rule_not_met (3/6, none held). The remaining UNTRIED built tools do not fit: token_count needs a literal (an inequality has none -- ANY value above the bound resolves); operand_enrichment needs a fixed-offset target-vs-decoy value (no decoy for a threshold); depth_reach measures line/true-side reach, not the magnitude-crossing this mechanism is about, and re-running it would not test the magnitude story; corpus_size_ratio is whole-corpus I2S inflation (wrong mechanism, G1 violation). Re-running the already-failed numeric tool at a relaxed threshold is forbidden. With the sole applicable built measurement exhausted, the honest outcome is decidable:false.

measurement.tool_mode: NONE remaining. value_distance_reached NUMERIC: the sole applicable magnitude-gap tool, already tried (round-3) and rule_not_met. token_count / operand_enrichment: need a literal / fixed-offset decoy that an inequality gate does not have. depth_reach / corpus_size_ratio: do not measure the numeric magnitude-crossing mechanism and/or are I2S-arm signals (G1 violation).

hypotheses.prediction: NONE. The only built tool able to measure the numeric magnitude-threshold crossing already failed on the real corpus; no genuinely different built measurement of this mechanism exists. Honest inconclusive is the correct G3 outcome.
hypotheses.rule_note: G3 honest non-discriminable. The round-3 numeric tool-gap was CLOSED (value_distance_reached numeric is built) and the test RAN -- it simply did not hold; re-running it relaxed is forbidden. Falls to fallback=inconclusive.

hypotheses.label: value_profile-resolving seeds reach a multi-byte operator/keyword/structural LITERAL strictly closer than cmplog-blocking AND naive-blocking seeds; the operand is not a single spliceable constant, so I2S stalls and naive gets no gradient while the CMP_MAP distance bucket ratchets a prefix/Hamming approach to the literal

measurement.registry_tool_note: literal mode: per-branch locate the gate operand window in each seed, per-seed MIN byte-distance to the target literal, median over value_profile-RESOLVING (vp_dist), cmplog-BLOCKING (cmp_dist), naive-BLOCKING (naive_dist). lit_dist_gap = min(cmp_dist, naive_dist) - vp_dist; vp_dist_frac = vp_dist / operand_width.

params.distance_metric: per_byte_abs_sum_min_over_offsets (contiguous); adjacency literals: unmatched-bytes of best adjacency occurrence

hypotheses.prediction: value_profile-resolving seeds sit CLOSE to the literal (vp_dist_frac low) while BOTH cmplog-blocking and naive-blocking seeds sit FAR, so lit_dist_gap > 0. DISCRIMINATING vs I2S substitution: single-literal I2S would let cmplog splice the constant, collapsing lit_dist_gap. DISCRIMINATING vs naive luck: naive_dist far confirms blind havoc never assembled the literal.
hypotheses.rule: lit_dist_gap >= 1.0 AND vp_dist_frac <= 0.34 AND cmp_dist > vp_dist AND naive_dist > vp_dist
hypotheses.note_restored: round-0 validated >=1 branch; KEEP (superset/monotonicity). libxml2_6756 and sqlite3_14777 are NOT in this hypothesis's operand list.

hypotheses.label: value_profile-resolving seeds drive a derived NUMERIC field past an inequality/range threshold; there is no exact literal to splice, so distance is the MAGNITUDE GAP to crossing the threshold -- vp closes it monotonically while cmplog (no single constant to substitute) and naive (no gradient) stall below the bound

measurement.registry_tool_note: NUMERIC mode (magnitude gap for inequality gates): parse the derived numeric field (_cmsReadUInt32Number big-endian u32 for TagCount) and compute the signed MAGNITUDE GAP to the threshold, clamped at 0 once crossed. Median over value_profile-RESOLVING (vp_gap), cmplog-BLOCKING (cmp_gap), naive-BLOCKING (naive_gap). mag_gap_lift = min(cmp_gap, naive_gap) - vp_gap; vp_crossed_frac = fraction of vp-resolving seeds with field_value > threshold.

operands_per_branch.lcms_2446: TagCount vs MAX_TABLE_TAG (4-byte big-endian u32 at cmsio0.c:826, compared > MAX_TABLE_TAG at line 827; gap = MAX_TABLE_TAG + 1 - TagCount, clamped at 0 once crossed)

hypotheses.prediction: value_profile-resolving seeds carry TagCount AT or ABOVE the threshold (vp_crossed_frac high, vp_gap ~ 0) while cmplog-blocking and naive-blocking seeds stay below, so mag_gap_lift > 0. DISCRIMINATING vs literal substitution: a threshold gate has no single constant for I2S to splice.
hypotheses.rule: vp_crossed_frac >= 0.5 AND mag_gap_lift > 0 AND cmp_gap > vp_gap AND naive_gap > vp_gap

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK not a mutator (data_realities #1,#2) -> measured ONLY via what the corpus REACHES/CONTAINS: structural token count + size (joint_necessity), fixed-offset operand byte enrichment (operand_enrichment), per-seed branch-line execution depth (depth_reach), parsed-value magnitude distance (value_distance_reached numeric), and exact-literal byte presence (token_count). NO seed_lineage 'gradient event'.
I2S is NOT tagged in mutation_op -> NO seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence proposed.

joint/structural-assembly gates have different-SIZED W vs L seeds (data_realities #3) -> byte_freq_ratio (fixed-offset alignment) applied ONLY to lcms_2141; token_count counts literal OCCURRENCES per seed (no offset alignment needed, robust to different-sized seeds); the token-class/threshold gates use token counting / per-seed depth or are judged decidable:false.

on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3 on s4 (data_realities #4). The sqlite3 branches are scored on s4. lcms_2141, lcms_2446, libxml2_6756 are sB's targets: sB scores them from its OWN on-disk corpus + db/blockers.sqlite + its libafl-{lcms,libxml2}-cov images. NOT marked decidable:false merely for being off THIS server (confirmed: lcms_2446 + libxml2_6756 have NO seeds in s4's DB, so the OWNING server (sB) arbitrates them).

the two decidable:false determinations (sqlite3_14777, lcms_2446) are made on MECHANISM-MEASURABILITY grounds valid for ALL servers -- NOT on corpus-location: sqlite3_14777's corpus IS on s4 (6 vp + 20 naive seeds) yet its literal-less token-class mechanism has no remaining discriminating built tool; lcms_2446's only applicable numeric tool already failed.

LW_L has NO value_profile BLOCKING arm and the DB carries NO cmplog BLOCKING seeds -> joint_necessity, depth_reach, token_count, and value_distance_reached are all used in winner(value_profile) vs loser(naive) mode.
notes:
ROUND 4 (FINAL, loop-until-dry). The 3 still-unlabeled branches each had a round-3 mechanism SCORED on real campaign data that DID NOT HOLD (lcms_2446 rule_not_met 3/6, libxml2_6756 rule_not_met 6/6, sqlite3_14777 rule_not_met 3/6). This round makes the terminal per-branch determination.

PRIORS KEPT (superset / monotonic, unchanged so confirmed branches re-validate):
  - vp_admits_token_richer_structural_corpus (joint_necessity) -- confirmed on sqlite3 OPERATOR branches 14438/15242/15515 (tag_lift 2.7-3.8). KEEP verbatim.
  - vp_enriches_fixed_offset_fourcc_operand (operand_enrichment) -- lcms_2141. KEEP verbatim.
  - vp_drives_parser_depth_into_structured_true_side (depth_reach) -- confirmed on >=1 of {sqlite3_14777, libxml2_6756} per round-3 scoring (the brief lists '1x' confirmed). KEEP verbatim; round-4 does NOT re-test the rule_not_met member with the same rule.
  - vp_climbs_numeric_magnitude_to_threshold (value_distance_reached numeric) -- KEEP verbatim ('2x' confirmed per brief).
  - vp_gradient_assembles_multibyte_literal (value_distance_reached literal) -- round-0 confirmer. KEEP verbatim.
  - vp_gradient_climbs_numeric_threshold (value_distance_reached numeric) -- round-0 confirmer. KEEP verbatim.

NEW MECHANISM this round (1):
  vp_assembles_exact_multibyte_opener_literal (decidable; descriptor seed_set:token_count:literal:per_branch, registry_tool=token_count -- a BUILT-but-UNTRIED-in-this-shape tool, present on disk at bench/tools/token_count.py). For libxml2_6756 ('<![CDATA[' 9-byte exact-literal opener). This is GENUINELY DIFFERENT from the two tools already refuted for this branch: tag_lift (round-2) counts XML structural token CLASSES, none of which is the literal opener -> it could not separate the branch; depth_reach (round-3) measures per-seed true-side EXECUTION, orthogonal to whether the corpus physically CARRIES the opener bytes. token_count directly counts the exact 9-byte opener in the value_profile-resolving vs naive-blocking corpus: a 9-byte literal has ~zero chance of appearing in an unrelated corpus, so winner_literal_count>=1 with literal_presence_ratio<<1 is a high-specificity gradient-assembly signature. Falsifiable (a null = ratio~1 or winner_count~0) and discriminating (rules out naive-found-it, token-class presence, execution-depth, and pure-I2S).

DECIDABLE:FALSE this round (2) -- HONEST G3, not forced labels:
  - sqlite3_14777 (vp_token_class_structured_sql_nonliteral): a token-CLASS gate with operand_literal=null. After depth_reach scored rule_not_met (round-3), NO remaining built tool discriminates the bare-VP token-class mechanism: token_count needs a literal (none); operand_enrichment needs a fixed-offset target-vs-decoy (none); value_distance_reached needs an operand/threshold (none); corpus_size_ratio measures whole-corpus I2S INFLATION/HOMOGENIZATION, which is the WRONG mechanism for a bare-VP LW_L gate and would not discriminate it from the no-effect alternative (G1 violation). This is decided on measurability, NOT corpus-location (its corpus IS on s4).
  - lcms_2446 (vp_numeric_threshold_exhausted_measurement): a numeric inequality (TagCount > MAX_TABLE_TAG) with no spliceable target constant. The ONLY built tool that can measure a magnitude crossing is value_distance_reached NUMERIC mode, which was applied (round-3) and scored rule_not_met. token_count/operand_enrichment need a literal/decoy an inequality lacks; depth_reach/corpus_size_ratio do not measure the magnitude-crossing mechanism (and corpus_size_ratio is an I2S-arm signal -> G1 violation). Re-running the already-failed numeric tool at a relaxed threshold is FORBIDDEN. The sole applicable built measurement is exhausted -> honest inconclusive.

WHY NOT FORCE A LABEL: the loop is genuinely DRY for sqlite3_14777 and lcms_2446 -- every built measurement either does not fit the gate's geometry (no literal / no fixed-offset / no numeric operand) or has already been tried and failed, and the one untried whole-corpus tool (corpus_size_ratio) measures a different (I2S inflation) mechanism that would not discriminate the bare-VP gradient (G1). An honest decidable:false is the CORRECT outcome (G3); both fall to fallback=inconclusive.

G1 DISCRIMINABILITY: the new token_count hypothesis predicts a depleted naive arm (ratio<<1) vs the naive-found-it alternative (ratio~1), and is orthogonal to the two refuted signals. G2 INDEPENDENCE: every metric (token count, byte enrichment, per-seed line-depth, parsed-magnitude distance, exact-literal occurrence count) is a corpus-STATE / execution quantity over the seed sets, computed independently of the value_profile-resolves pattern that defined the shape.

TOOLS: every decidable hypothesis REUSES a BUILT tool by descriptor (joint_necessity, operand_enrichment, depth_reach, value_distance_reached x2, token_count). NO new descriptor is invented. TARGETS: lcms, libxml2, sqlite3.
